---
title: "Code Modules"
---

A reference mapping from each algorithm stage to the implementing
module, key functions, and entry points.

## Pipeline → module mapping

| Algorithm stage | Module | Key function(s) |
|---|---|---|
| **1. Time-delay embedding** | `shrec.embeddings` | `embed_ts(X, m)`, `hankel_matrix(data, q)`, `make_embedding(X, d_embed)` |
| **2. Fuzzy simplicial complex** | `shrec.recurrence.simplicial` | `dataset_to_simplex(X, k=20, tol=1e-6)` |
| **3. Consensus aggregation** | `shrec.recurrence.consensus` | `data_to_connectivity2(X, k=10, tol=1e-5)` |
| **4a. Discrete driver** | `shrec.graph.communities` | `_leiden(g, method, objective, resolution)` |
| **4b. Continuous driver** | `shrec.models.recurrence_manifold` | `RecurrenceManifold.fit(X)` → Fiedler eigenvector |
| **Preprocessing** | `shrec.models.base` | `RecurrenceModel._preprocess(X)`, `_make_embedding(X)` |

## Baselines

| Method | Module | Key function(s) |
|---|---|---|
| **Sauer (2004)** — union-find on binary recurrences | `shrec.models.classical` | `ClassicalRecurrenceClustering.fit(X)` |
| Exp-kernel recurrence (used by Sauer) | `shrec.recurrence.kernel` | `data_to_connectivity(X, scale, ord)` |
| **Hirata–Nomura** — common-neighbour ratio + Isomap | `shrec.models.hirata_nomura` | `HirataNomuraIsomap.fit(X)` |
| Common-neighbour Jaccard similarity | `shrec.utils.graph_tools` | `common_neighbors_ratio(adj)` |

## High-level API

All models follow the sklearn contract: `fit(X, y=None) → self`.

```python
from shrec import (
    RecurrenceClustering,      # discrete driver (Leiden)
    RecurrenceManifold,        # continuous driver (Fiedler)
    ClassicalRecurrenceClustering,  # Sauer baseline
    HirataNomuraIsomap,        # Hirata–Nomura baseline
)

from shrec import embed_ts, hankel_matrix, make_embedding
```

## Data flow

```
Raw responses X (T × N)
    │
    ├─ _preprocess(X)           [base.py]
    │   ├── detrend_ts()        [utils/preprocessing.py]
    │   ├── PowerTransformer()  [sklearn]
    │   ├── StandardScaler()    [sklearn]
    │   └── nan_fill()          [utils/preprocessing.py]
    │
    ├─ _make_embedding(X)       [base.py → embeddings.py]
    │   └── make_embedding(X, d_embed, noise, rng)
    │
    ├─ data_to_connectivity2()  [recurrence/consensus.py]
    │   └── for each response k:
    │       └── dataset_to_simplex(Y_k, k)  [recurrence/simplicial.py]
    │           ├── cdist(Y_k, Y_k)
    │           ├── root-solve σ_i for each row
    │           └── symmetrise via fuzzy union
    │
    └─ Driver extraction:
        ├── RecurrenceClustering → _leiden(A)   [graph/communities.py]
        └── RecurrenceManifold  → eigh(L=D−A)  [scipy.linalg]
```

## Key hyperparameters

### Shared (all models inherit from `RecurrenceModel`)

| Parameter | Default | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `d_embed` | `3` | Embedding dimension $D$ |
| `noise` | `0.0` | i.i.d. Gaussian regularisation |
| `time_exclude` | `0` | Suppress recurrences within $\pm t$ of diagonal |
| `standardize` | `True` | Z-score normalisation before embedding |
| `random_state` | `None` | RNG seed (always local `default_rng`, never global) |

### RecurrenceClustering (discrete)

| Parameter | Default | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `resolution` | `1.0` | Leiden modularity resolution |
| `objective` | `"modularity"` | Quality function (`"modularity"` or `"cpm"`) |
| `method` | `"graspologic"` | Backend (`"graspologic"`, `"igraph"`, `"leidenalg"`, `"cdlib"`) |

### RecurrenceManifold (continuous)

| Parameter | Default | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `n_components` | `1` | Number of Laplacian eigenvectors to extract |

### ClassicalRecurrenceClustering (Sauer baseline)

| Parameter | Default | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `tolerance` | `0.01` | Sparsification target |
| `scale` | `1.0` | Distance threshold scaling |
| `aggregation_order` | `1.0` | Power-mean exponent ($p$-norm over responses) |

## Sub-package layout

```
src/shrec/
├── __init__.py              # version + public API re-exports
├── embeddings.py            # Stage 1: embed_ts, hankel_matrix, make_embedding
├── recurrence/
│   ├── simplicial.py        # Stage 2: dataset_to_simplex (canonical)
│   ├── kernel.py            # Baseline: data_to_connectivity (Sauer)
│   └── consensus.py         # Stage 3: data_to_connectivity2
├── graph/
│   ├── communities.py       # Stage 4a: _leiden multi-backend adapter
│   └── unionfind.py         # Baseline: DisjointSet, solve_union_find
├── models/
│   ├── base.py              # RecurrenceModel (sklearn-clean base)
│   ├── recurrence_clustering.py   # RecurrenceClustering
│   ├── recurrence_manifold.py     # RecurrenceManifold
│   ├── classical.py               # ClassicalRecurrenceClustering
│   ├── hirata_nomura.py           # HirataNomuraIsomap
│   └── models.py                  # back-compat re-export shim
└── utils/
    ├── preprocessing.py     # detrend, standardise, NaN handling
    ├── graph_tools.py       # common_neighbors_ratio, adjacency utils
    ├── signal.py            # discretise, PSD, group_consecutives
    ├── surrogates.py        # surrogate time series generation
    ├── metrics.py           # sparsify, otsu_threshold, evaluation
    ├── transforms.py        # RigidTransform
    └── io.py                # I/O utilities
```
